title: OP Waffles
description: This adds overpowered waffle related items, as well as waffles.
body:
# OP Waffles
OP Waffles is a mod which adds way overpowered waffles (more info further down). Disclaimer: Probably don't use this in survival as it is way to OP. Download JEI or something if you want the recipes.

## What the waffles do?
1. Refined Waffle -The refined waffle gives insane buffs such as strength, and regeneration. As well as giving a health boost.

1. Waffle candy -The waffle candy is a normal food item with no extras.

## Equipment

1. Pickaxe - The Waffle Pickaxe can break bedrock, if enabled in the gamerules.

1. Armour - The Waffle Armour is better then netherite in defense, other then that it has no special abilities.
